mapper.select: SELECT B.CONTRACT_NUM, AGENT_ID, NVL(BASIC_REMAINS,0) BASIC_REMAINS, NVL(VIR_ACCOUNT_ID,'') VIR_ACCOUNT_ID, NVL(F_GET_VAC_BANK_NAME(VIR_ACCOUNT_ID),'') VAC_BANK_NM, NVL(F_GET_VAC_BANK_CODE(VIR_ACCOUNT_ID),'') VAC_BANK_CD, LANG_CODE, AD_NATION, B.SUBSCRIBER_NO, B.SUB_LINK_NAME, NVL(A.AGENT_SALE_ID,'') AGENT_SALE_ID FROM PPS_CUSTOMER A, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND AGENT_ID = #{loginAgentId} AND B.SUB_STATUS IN ('A','S') AND A.SERVICE_TYPE = 'PP' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
SELECT AGENT_DOC_FLAG agentDocFlag FROM PPS_AGENT WHERE AGENT_ID = #{loginAgentId}

SELECT A.CMS_CHARGE_TYPE AS cmsChargeType, CMS_BANK_CODE AS cmsBankCode, F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('PPS_RCG_REAL_CMS', 'BANK_CODE', CMS_BANK_CODE) AS cmsBankCodeNm, CMS_ACCOUNT AS cmsAccount, CMS_USER_NAME AS cmsUserName, CMS_CHARGE AS cmsCharge, CMS_TRY_REMAINS AS cmsTryRemains, CMS_CHARGE_DATE AS cmsChargeDate, CMS_CHARGE_MONTH AS cmsChargeMonth FROM PPS_CUSTOMER A, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND A.AGENT_ID = #{agentId}
